headline: A Look At L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Valuation After Fiber Optic Tether Production Expansion
summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) is expanding production of its fiber-optic tether systems for military drones and underwater platforms, responding to heightened electronic warfare threats and growing demand for secure communications in situations where radio signals risk disruption. See our latest analysis for L3Harris Technologies. headline: L3Harris Expands Fiber Tether Output As Electronic Warfare Shapes Defense Demand
summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) is expanding production of its advanced fiber-optic tether systems. The ramp up targets rising demand from the Pentagon and allied forces for secure links to drones and underwater platforms. The move is a response to growing electronic warfare threats affecting military communications. L3Harris Technologies operates as a defense technology company focused on communications, sensors, and mission systems for government and allied customers. The decision to...
